name: Voyager Therapeutics, Inc.
summary: PART I We are a biotechnology company whose mission is to leverage the power of human genetics to modify the course of and ultimately cure neurological diseases. Our pipeline includes programs for Alzheimers disease, or AD; Friedreichs ataxia, or FA; Parkinsons disease, or PD; and multiple other diseases of the central nervous system, or CNS. Many of our programs are derived from our TRACER (Tropism Redirection of AAV by Cell-type-specific Expression of RNA) adeno-associated virus, or AAV, capsi...
